THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING AMENDED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SCHAEFFER, HENRY THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 561 LAIDLEY STREET, SAN FRANCISCO, CA, STAYED UNTIL MAR-31-1999, LEASE FORFEITED, PLAINTIFF WAIVES RECOVERY FOR 17 DEC 98 THRU 31 MAR 99 AND WILL PAY $500.00 TO DEFENDANT FOR RELOCATION ASSISTANCE. IF DEFENDANT VACATES ON OR BEFORE 31 MAR 99, JUDGMENT SHALL BE VACATED AND ACTION DISMISSED.
